creator: hans@lambermont.dyndns.org
text:
kstars 1.2.5 is part of kdeedu-3.5.6_1 which does not contain README.ephemerides. (The latest kdeedu-3.5.7 also does not have this file).

(The README.ephemerides includes a description on how to update the comet data file, see also http://bugs.kde.org/show_bug.cgi?id=151206 and http://websvn.kde.org/trunk/KDE/kdeedu/kstars/README.ephemerides?revision=623819&view=markup )
